entity.summary: New Zealand digital-asset exchange operated by Digital Asset Exchange Limited. The company was incorporated on 2017-04-24 and later traded as Dasset. After losing its banking provider and facing withdrawal and trading disruption, it ceased trading and entered liquidation on 2023-08-14.
entity.notes: The incorporation date is used as a conservative lifecycle start because a precise public exchange launch date is not established in the current source set. The liquidators reported a major shortfall between user balances and digital assets held.

events.title: Digital Asset Exchange Limited was incorporated
events.description: The New Zealand company that later operated the Dasset digital-asset exchange was incorporated on 2017-04-24.
events.notes: This is a conservative corporate lifecycle marker, not a claim that public trading began on the incorporation day.

events.title: Banking loss contributed to account restrictions and halted trading
events.description: Dasset's banking provider withdrew support in January 2023. Liquidators later reported that bank accounts were suspended and trading was halted as the company became unable to operate profitably.
events.notes: Month-level date retained as 2023-01-01 because the sources establish January 2023 but not a precise day.

events.title: Dasset ceased trading and entered liquidation
events.description: Shareholders appointed Grant Thornton liquidators to Digital Asset Exchange Limited at 2:00 p.m. on 2023-08-14. The company ceased trading the same day.

evidence.title: Liquidators' Initial Report on the State of Affairs of Digital Asset Exchange Limited
evidence.notes: Primary liquidator report records incorporation on 2017-04-24 and cessation of trading on 2023-08-14.

evidence.title: Liquidators' Initial Report on the State of Affairs of Digital Asset Exchange Limited
evidence.notes: Primary report explains loss of the banking provider, suspension of accounts, halted trading, and the reported asset shortfall.

evidence.title: Customers desperate as Auckland-based crypto exchange Dasset denies access to funds
evidence.notes: Reports customer withdrawal problems and the exchange's banking-provider difficulties.

evidence.title: Digital Asset Exchange Limited in liquidation
evidence.notes: Official notice states liquidation commenced on 2023-08-14 at 2:00 p.m.

evidence.title: Update for Dasset Creditors and Users 15 August 2023
evidence.notes: Liquidators identify Dasset as a New Zealand digital-assets trading platform and describe the profitability deterioration.

evidence.title: Dasset updates
evidence.notes: Official liquidation hub preserving reports and creditor updates.
